title: Unit 5 – Practice Pool 6: 'Fun' in Scotland (Modalverben im Dialog)
description: Modal substitute forms in context: was/were able to, wasn't/weren't able to, had to

items.question: Holly wanted to visit the castle but she ___. (konnte nicht – zu teuer)
But you ___ take some photos of the castle, weren't you? (konntest)
Amber and I ___ go shopping on the Royal Mile. (konnten)
We ___ go inside the palace. (konnten nicht – zu teuer)
I ___ go inside old castles. (musste – Eltern)
You and I ___ go swimming. (konnten nicht)
We ___ visit all the different sights. (konnten nicht)
Mum said it was too expensive, so Holly ___ visit the castle.
Taking photos is free, so Holly ___ take photos.
Dave's parents took him to museums, so he ___ go there.
The water in Scotland is too cold, so Holly ___ swim.
können (Simple Past, I/he/she/it) → positiv
können (Simple Past, I/he/she/it) → negativ
können (Simple Past, we/you/they) → positiv
können (Simple Past, we/you/they) → negativ
müssen (Simple Past, alle Personen) → ___ to
nicht müssen (Simple Past) → didn't ___ to
That doesn't cost ___. (Es kostet nichts.)
Holly's mum always said: 'Forget it! No ___!'
Holyrood Palace is in ___ (Stadt).
